emails.subject: Re: New Basis Swap Products
emails.body: Re: New Basis Swap Products These look ok. I'm still unhappy with using an average of the index for each day when there is only one index for the entire month but I guess we're stuck with it for now. Dale Neuner on 02/17/2000 04:41:54 PM
